entities.baker: a baker in a white apron and chef hat
entities.girl: a girl in a blue jacket

scenes.title: The Town Square
scenes.background_prompt: A charming town square with cobblestone ground, a bakery shopfront with a striped awning, a clock tower showing 3 PM, and autumn leaves scattered on the ground. Warm afternoon light. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A charming town square on a warm autumn afternoon. A baker in a white apron and a tall white chef hat stands outside his bakery shop, holding a wooden tray piled with freshly baked golden-brown loaves of bread. Steam still rises faintly from the bread. The bakery behind him has a warm yellow facade with a brown-and-white striped awning and a chalkboard sign. A girl in a blue jacket and brown boots walks toward the baker from the right side of the scene, looking at the bread with interest. A clock tower rises in the background, its face clearly showing 3 PM. Fallen orange and red autumn leaves swirl gently on the cobblestone ground. A few other shops with colorful facades line the square, and warm golden light bathes the scene.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place baker outside his shop, standing and holding a wooden tray piled with freshly baked golden-brown loaves, faint steam rising. Place girl walking toward the baker from the right, looking at the bread with interest.
